debug_info.goal:
A : Type u
U V : A → Type v
hAUBV : ((a : A) → U a) = ((a : A) → V a)
⊢ U = V

failed_attempts:
funext a
  have h : U a = V a := by
    have hfun : ((a : A) → U a) → ((a : A) → V a) := Eq.mp hAUBV
    have hfun' : ((a : A) → V a) → ((a : A) → U a) := Eq.mpr hAUBV
    have h₁ : V a → U a := fun x => hfun' (fun _ => x) a
    have h₂ : U a → V a := fun x => hfun (fun _ => x) a
    exact propext ⟨h₂, h₁⟩ |> (fun h => by
      cases h
      rfl)
  cases h
  rfl

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun F : ((a : A) → U a) => F a) hAUBV
  simpa using h

funext a
  have h : U a = V a := by
    have := congrArg (fun F : (a : A) → Type v => F a) hAUBV
    exact this
  exact h

funext a
  have h : U a = V a := by
    have h' : (U a → PUnit) = (V a → PUnit) := congrArg (fun F => F a → PUnit) hAUBV
    exact congrArg (fun W => W PUnit.unit) h'
  exact h

funext a
  have h : U a = V a := by
    have h' : ((U a) → Type v) = ((V a) → Type v) := by
      have := congrArg (fun F : ((a : A) → Type v) => (F a → Type v)) hAUBV
      simpa using this
    exact congrArg (fun X : Type v => X) (funext (fun x : U a => (show Type v from (Eq.ndrec (motive := fun _ => Type v) (Type v) (by cases h'; rfl)))))
  exact h

funext a
  have h' : U a = V a := by
    have : (U a → False) = (V a → False) := by
      funext f
      have : ((fun g : (a : A) → U a => g a) (Eq.mp hAUBV (fun _ => False.elim))) = False := by
        rfl
      cases hAUBV
      rfl
    exact funext (fun x => by cases x; rfl) |> by
      cases this
      rfl
  exact h'

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun (f : (a : A) → U a) => (f a)) (Eq.ndrec (motive := fun X => X = ((a : A) → V a) → ((a : A) → U a) = ((a : A) → V a)) (fun h => h) rfl hAUBV)
  simpa using congrArg (fun (X : Type v) => X) h

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun F => F a) hAUBV
  exact (Eq.mp (propext Iff.rfl) (Eq.ndrec (motive := fun W => U a = W) rfl h)).symm

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun F => F a) hAUBV
  exact eq_of_heq (congrArg (fun X => X) h)

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun (F : ((a : A) → Type v)) => F a) (congrArg (fun (f : ((a : A) → U a)) => fun a => U a) hAUBV)
  simpa using h

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun (f : (a : A) → U a) => f a) hAUBV
  exact Eq.ndrec (motive := fun W => U a = W) (rfl) h

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun F : ((a : A) → U a) => F a) hAUBV
  simpa using h

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun (F : (a : A) → Type v) => F a) (congrArg (fun X => (a : A) → X a) (rfl : U = U))
  exact rfl

funext a
  apply congrArg (fun f => f a) hAUBV

funext a
  have h : U a → Type v := fun _ => Type v
  have h' : (U a → Type v) = (V a → Type v) := by
    simpa [h] using congrArg (fun F => (x : U a) → F a) hAUBV
  exact congrArg (fun W => W Unit) (congrArg (fun f => f (fun _ => PUnit.unit)) h')

funext a
  have h : U a = V a := by
    simpa using congrArg (fun (f : (a : A) → U a) => (f a)) hAUBV
  exact h

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun f => f a) hAUBV
  exact congrArg (fun X => X) h

funext a
  have h : (U a → Type v) = (V a → Type v) := by
    simpa using congrArg (fun F : ((a : A) → Type v) => (F a → Type v)) hAUBV
  exact congrArg (fun X : (Type v) => X) (congrArg (fun f : (U a → Type v) => f (U a)) h)

funext a
  have h : U a = V a := congrArg (fun f => f a) hAUBV
  exact congrArg (fun X => X) h

funext a
  have h : U a = V a := by
    have := congrArg (fun F : ((a : A) → Type v) => F a) (congrArg (fun X : Type (max u v) => (a : A) → X) rfl)
    exact (congrArg (fun F : (a : A) → Type v => F a) (by
      funext a; rfl))
  exact propext (Iff.intro (fun hUa => cast (by cases hAUBV; rfl) hUa) (fun hVa => cast (by cases hAUBV; rfl) hVa))

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun f => f a) hAUBV
  exact Eq.ndrec rfl h

funext a
  have h : U a = V a := by
    have := congrArg (fun F : ((a : A) → Type v) => F a) hAUBV
    exact this
  exact h

cases hAUBV
  rfl

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun F => F a) hAUBV
  exact Eq.ndrec (motive := fun X => U a = X) rfl h

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun F => F a) hAUBV
  exact congrArg (fun X => X) h

funext a
  have h : U a = V a := by
    have := congrArg (fun f => f a) hAUBV
    exact Eq.ndrec (motive := fun X => U a = X) rfl this
  exact h

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun F => F a) hAUBV
  exact Eq.ndrec (motive := fun W => U a = W) rfl h

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun f => f a) hAUBV
  simpa using h

funext a
  have h : U a = V a := by
    have := congrArg (fun (f : (a : A) → U a) => f a) (Eq.ndrec (motive := fun W : A → Type v => ((a : A) → U a) = ((a : A) → W a)) rfl hAUBV)
    exact this
  exact h

funext a
  apply congrArg (fun f => f a) hAUBV

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun (F : (a : A) → Type v) => F a) (congrArg (fun X => (a : A) → X a) (rfl : U = U))
  cases hAUBV

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun f => f a) hAUBV
